name: grep
desc: Filters standard input based on a given regex pattern. (Unix classic)

name: sed
desc: Find and replace text using regular expressions.

name: awk
desc: Pattern scanning and text data extraction tool.

name: sort
desc: Sorts lines of text files or standard input.

name: uniq
desc: Reports or omits repeated lines in text.

name: wc
desc: Counts lines, words, and characters in the input.

name: head
desc: Outputs the first part (e.g., 10 lines) of files or piped data.

name: tail
desc: Outputs the last part of files or piped data.

name: cut
desc: Removes specific sections or columns from each line.

name: diff
desc: Compares two text streams line by line and highlights changes.

name: jq
desc: Command-line JSON processor. Extracts specific data from JSON.

name: jsonfmt
desc: Formats, beautifies, or minifies JSON data for readability.

name: jsondiff
desc: Finds and displays differences between two JSON objects.

name: yaml2json
desc: Converts YAML configuration files to JSON.

name: json2yaml
desc: Converts JSON data into YAML format.

name: csv2json
desc: Converts CSV table data into a JSON array.

name: json2csv
desc: Converts JSON array data into CSV format for Excel.

name: xml2json
desc: Converts legacy XML data into modern JSON format.

name: csvstats
desc: Generates basic statistics and summaries for CSV data.

name: csvcut
desc: Filters and extracts specific columns from CSV files.

name: csvsql
desc: Executes SQL queries directly on raw CSV data streams.

name: math
desc: Evaluates mathematical expressions passed via standard input.

name: stats
desc: Calculates mean, median, and sum for a list of numbers.

name: base64
desc: Encodes or decodes data using the Base64 algorithm.

name: jwt
desc: Decodes and inspects JSON Web Tokens (JWT) safely offline.

name: urlencode
desc: Encodes or decodes URL components (e.g. replacing spaces with %20).

name: sha256
desc: Generates a secure SHA-256 cryptographic hash.

name: md5
desc: Generates a classic MD5 hash for given input.

name: bcrypt
desc: Hashes passwords securely using the bcrypt algorithm.

name: uuid
desc: Generates random, unique V4 UUID strings.

name: hex
desc: Converts text to Hexadecimal machine code, or Hex to text.

name: html2text
desc: Strips all HTML tags and returns clean, readable text.

name: domquery
desc: Extracts specific elements from HTML using CSS selectors.

name: linkextract
desc: Finds and lists all outbound URLs (<a href>) from an HTML page.

name: md2html
desc: Converts Markdown text into clean HTML code.

name: urlparse
desc: Parses complex URLs into JSON containing domain, path, and queries.

name: cssminify
desc: Minifies CSS stylesheets by removing unnecessary whitespace.

name: timestamp
desc: Converts Unix epoch timestamps to human-readable dates.

name: regex
desc: Extracts IPs, emails, or custom regex patterns from text.

name: cron
desc: Translates cron schedule expressions into readable English.

name: env2json
desc: Parses .env configuration files into JSON format.

name: random
desc: Generates random strings, passwords, or numbers for testing.

name: lorem
desc: Generates 'Lorem Ipsum' placeholder text for UI testing.

name: hexdump
desc: Creates a hexadecimal view of any binary or text input.

name: python
desc: Official Python WebAssembly runtime.

name: ruby-slim
desc: Official Ruby WebAssembly runtime (Slim version).

name: php-slim
desc: Official PHP WebAssembly runtime (Slim version).

name: lowercase
desc: Converts all standard input text to lowercase letters.

name: uppercase
desc: Converts all standard input text to uppercase letters.

name: slugify
desc: Converts strings into URL-friendly slugs (e.g., 'Hello World' -> 'hello-world').

name: wordwrap
desc: Wraps long lines of text to fit within a specific column width.
